session.user:
Run the following command and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ty check src/ 2>&1 | tail -20 ```
Report whether all checks passed or list any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checking command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/ 2>&1 | tail -20
Run type checker on src/ directory and show last 20 lines

session.assistant:
ty passed: All checks passed!
The type checking analysis completed successfully with no errors or warnings found in the src/ directory.
